# Ali Ahmed — AI Solutions Engineer
> A founder-grade operator who ships production-grade AI products and owns the business behind them.

Canonical site: https://alioahmed.vercel.app
Location: Lahore, Pakistan
One-liner: I build what I sell — and sell what I build.
Entity anchors (must co-occur with the name): Cognilium AI, Bijli Bachao

## Biography

Ali Ahmed is an AI Solutions Engineer who builds what he sells — and sells what he builds. He turns vague business problems into LLM/RAG products, AI agents, and IoT platforms that ship to production and actually run, owning both the build and the business behind it. At Cognilium AI (US & UAE clients) he took four AI products from idea to deployment: Paralegent (an agentic legal-AI system), VORTA (an enterprise RAG assistant at 92% first-call resolution), ProspectVox (a voice sales agent), and VectorHire (an AI recruiter). As Head of Product & Platforms at Bijli Bachao he built and runs three live IoT energy platforms. Earlier he co-founded Wonder Women, Pakistan’s first FemTech — closing Procter & Gamble, Engro, and Aga Khan University Hospital. He is trusted to deliver Gates Foundation– and UNIDO-backed programmes. Open to remote-global roles and relocation to the Gulf, US, or Australia.

Standard bio: Ali Ahmed is an AI Solutions Engineer who builds what he sells — turning business problems into LLM/RAG products, AI agents, and IoT platforms that ship to production and actually run. AI Solutions Engineer @ Cognilium AI · Head of Product & Platforms @ Bijli Bachao. Trusted on Gates Foundation & UNIDO programmes; partners incl. P&G, Engro, Aga Khan.
Short bio: AI Solutions Engineer. I turn vague problems into LLM/RAG products, AI agents & IoT platforms that ship to production. 4 AI products + 3 IoT platforms shipped.

## Positioning & availability

Primary title: AI Solutions Engineer @ Cognilium AI
Secondary role: Head of Product & Platforms @ Bijli Bachao
Also framed as: Forward-Deployed Engineer
Open to remote-global roles and relocation to the Gulf (UAE/Saudi/Qatar), US, or Australia, plus fractional AI-delivery consulting.

Hiring teams: Looking for someone who can take an AI product from idea to production and own the outcome — AI Solutions Engineer / Forward-Deployed Engineer, remote-global or relocation.

Founders & teams: Need an AI feature or product shipped fast and for real? I do fractional AI-delivery — scoping, building, and deploying LLM/RAG products and agents.

## Capabilities

### Applied AI, built to ship
I turn vague problems into LLM/RAG products and AI agents that run in production — mapping the real workflow, defining the metric that matters, and releasing in iterations.
Skills: Large Language Models, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, AI agents & agentic systems, LLM evaluation (evals), Vector databases, LangChain / LangGraph, Prompt engineering, Model Context Protocol, Voice AI

### Product & solution ownership
I own the build and the business behind it — scoping, pre-sales, delivery, and the metric the customer actually cares about.
Skills: Product management, Solution design, Pre-sales engineering, Customer-facing delivery, Stakeholder management

### Go-to-market from zero
I’ve built growth engines from nothing — outreach systems, brand, and the operating spine (HR, finance, compliance) that turns a product into a business.
Skills: Go-to-market strategy, Growth engineering, Operations

Knows about (expertise index): Large Language Models, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, AI agents & agentic systems, LLM evaluation (evals), Vector databases, LangChain / LangGraph, Prompt engineering, Model Context Protocol, Voice AI, Product management, Solution design, Pre-sales engineering, Customer-facing delivery, Stakeholder management, Go-to-market strategy, Growth engineering, Operations

## Experience (career spine)

### AI Solutions Engineer — Cognilium AI (Sept 2024 – present)
  Remote · US & UAE clients
  The operator who built the commercial machine of an AI engineering firm — and shipped its products.
  - Took four AI products idea → production: Paralegent (agentic legal AI), VORTA (enterprise RAG), ProspectVox (voice sales AI), and VectorHire (AI recruitment).
  - Coded two production websites end-to-end (Next.js/React/TypeScript) plus a production Chrome extension.
  - Built the growth engine from zero — Upwork strategy, a 6-domain cold-email stack, and outreach that brought in USD 50,000+ in client value.
  - Stood up HR from scratch and ran finance, banking, and PSEB / IT-export compliance.
  Metrics: 4 AI products to production · USD 50K+ client value generated

### Head of Product & Platforms — Bijli Bachao (Oct 2025 – present)
  Pakistan
  Designed, built, and owns three live SaaS/IoT platforms covering Pakistan’s commercial-energy lifecycle — built to international IEC engineering standards.
  - Wattey — real-time IoT electricity monitoring (~1.04 GWh tracked across 22 meters in 8 industrial sectors).
  - Solar Performance Cloud — independent multi-brand, string-level solar monitoring (56 sites · 70 inverters · 698 PV strings · 785 MWh tracked).
  - TenantBill — OCR-verified multi-tenant billing, live in a real mall (74 tenants · 469 meters).
  - Running real Pakistani factories, solar plants, and shopping malls — ~3 MW and growing. Founded by Engr. Reyyan Niaz Khan, an energy-sector pioneer.
  Metrics: 3 live IoT platforms · ~3 MW and growing

### Head of Outreach & Ecosystem Engagement — UNIDO PAIDAR Programme (Dec 2025 – Apr 2026)
  Pakistan · via Digitara
  Turned an unknown UN grant programme into a room full of Pakistan’s top founders — in 9 days, with no budget.
  - Assembled Pakistan’s startup elite into one room on the strength of an 8-year network.
  - Secured Fiza Farhan (UN Secretary-General’s panel, Forbes 30 Under 30) on keynote, plus founders of Bookme, Interwood, ORA Global, Bramerz, and Amal Academy on stage.
  - Mobilised 70+ founders & CEOs (Bykea, Marham, Edkasa, Kistpay…) to attend — engaged via Digitara on the UNIDO PAIDAR Programme.
  Metrics: 9 days outreach to event · 70+ founders & CEOs in the room
  Trusted by / partners: UNIDO (UN), European Union

### Co-Founder & Head of Product — Wonder Women (May 2022 – Oct 2024)
  Pakistan
  Co-founded Pakistan’s FemTech startup and built both sides — the physical product (Asani) and the digital health platform on top.
  - Built Asani — Pakistan’s first locally-assembled sanitary-pad vending machine, at ~1/10th the imported cost.
  - Drove it from pre-revenue to PKR 3.7M revenue in the first 12 months: 29 machines · 24 locations · 75,000+ transactions.
  - Won the HEC Innovator Seed Fund (USD 35,000) — 1 of 15 from 186 applicants.
  - Closed Procter & Gamble (#AlwaysAsani) and negotiated a partial-exclusivity carve-out — as a young founder, across the table from a multinational.
  Metrics: 75,000+ transactions · PKR 3.7M first-year revenue · USD 35K HEC seed fund won
  Trusted by / partners: Procter & Gamble, Engro, NETSOL, Sapphire, Devsinc, Aga Khan University Hospital

### Program Manager & Business Intelligence Lead — CIRCLE Women (Feb 2023 – Oct 2023)
  Pakistan
  Ran the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation–backed Digital Literacy Programme end-to-end, and built the BI system that measured it.
  - Delivered end-to-end programme management — scope, timelines, KPIs, stakeholder management — backed by the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation.
  - Trained 10,000 women across digital literacy, financial literacy, business, and life skills during his tenure.
  - Rebuilt CIRCLE’s impact-measurement system in Power BI — automated dashboards and pipelines that kept running after he left.
  - Cut reporting time by 40% and improved resource-allocation efficiency by 20%.
  Metrics: 10,000 women trained · −40% reporting time
  Trusted by / partners: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation

### Head of Business Development (Startups) — Innovation District 92 (Feb 2021 – Feb 2023)
  Superior University, Pakistan
  Went from multi-role operator to national-scale ecosystem builder — convening startup competitions at country scale.
  - Country Host / National Organiser for the Entrepreneurship World Cup (2021 & 2022) — 5,000+ applicants in 2021.
  - Team Lead & Project Manager for the SEE Pakistan National Startup Championship 2022 — 1,500+ startups across 81 cities and 5 provinces.
  - Drove a 30% lift in incubation outcomes and 15+ ecosystem partnerships at ID92.
  Metrics: 5,000+ EWC applicants (2021) · 1,500+ startups, SEE Pakistan

### Consultant — Programme Migration & Diaspora — GIZ (Dec 2021 – Apr 2022)
  Germany & Pakistan
  A consultancy with the German federal government’s development agency, across Germany and Pakistan.
  - Worked on regular, safe-migration pathways to Germany — developing branding and information-exchange materials.
  - A short, well-framed engagement carried as a credibility anchor: international scope, federal-government counterpart.
  Trusted by / partners: GIZ (German federal government)

### Developer · Product Coordinator — Freelance & early product roles (2017 – 2021)
  Pakistan & remote (Sweden, Indonesia)
  The polymath foundation — learning the whole stack of building and growing a tech company, in parallel, from the code up.
  - Community Manager at Evolve Machine Learners — 30+ events, 500+ participants, corporate AI training for Philip Morris International and Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia.
  - Product Coordinator at Intelsys / Green Plank (Sweden) — drove measurable lifts in online sales and engagement.
  - Freelance developer across C++, Java, Ruby on Rails, React, and Android.


## Projects (portfolio — what Ali built)

### Paralegent — Agentic contract due-diligence, inside Microsoft Word.
  Cognilium AI · AI Product Manager · production · 2026
  An agentic legal-AI system that reviews contracts against a customer’s own playbook and returns GREEN/ORANGE/RED redlines — deployed in the customer’s own cloud, not as SaaS.
  - 18+ specialised AI agents plus an orchestrator on LangGraph + Google ADK, LLM-agnostic.
  - Turns ~30 hours of MSA review into ~30 minutes; 40–50 findings per contract.
  - Built the go-to-market website end-to-end (56 pages, 50 components).
  Metrics: 18+ AI agents · 30h → 30m per contract review
  Stack: LangGraph, Google ADK, Azure OpenAI, Next.js

### VORTA — Enterprise RAG assistant at 92% first-call resolution.
  Cognilium AI · AI Solutions Engineer · production
  A retrieval-augmented enterprise assistant that hit 92% first-call resolution across 22 languages — with the kind of impact that replaced a 24-person support team.
  - 92% first-call resolution; 22 languages.
  - Drove an estimated USD 400K in savings for the deployment.
  Metrics: 92% first-call resolution · USD 400K estimated savings
  Stack: RAG, Vector DB, LLM evals

### ProspectVox — Voice sales agent that actually connects.
  Cognilium AI · AI Solutions Engineer · production
  A voice AI sales agent built idea → production, tuned for real connect rates.
  - 47% connect rate on live outreach.
  Metrics: 47% connect rate
  Stack: Voice AI, LLM

### VectorHire — AI recruitment that cuts hiring time.
  Cognilium AI · AI Solutions Engineer · production
  An AI recruiter built idea → production that compresses the hiring funnel.
  - ~60% reduction in hiring time.
  Metrics: −60% hiring time
  Stack: LLM, Vector DB

### Wattey — Real-time IoT electricity monitoring for industry.
  Bijli Bachao · Head of Product & Platforms · live
  Real-time grid-consumption monitoring for Pakistani factories, mills, malls, and hotels — built to IEC standards.
  - ~1.04 GWh tracked across 22 meters in 8 industrial sectors.
  Metrics: ~1.04 GWh monitored
  Stack: IoT, SaaS, Time-series

### Solar Performance Cloud — Independent, string-level solar monitoring.
  Bijli Bachao · Head of Product & Platforms · live
  Independent, multi-brand solar-generation monitoring down to the PV-circuit level — aligned to IEC 61724-1 and IEC 62446-1.
  - 56 sites · 70 inverters · 698 PV strings · 5 inverter brands · 785 MWh tracked.
  Metrics: 56 sites · 785 MWh tracked
  Stack: IoT, SaaS, Solar

### TenantBill — OCR-verified multi-tenant billing.
  Bijli Bachao · Head of Product & Platforms · live
  Photo-verified multi-tenant electricity billing for malls and commercial properties — live in a real mall.
  - 74 tenants · 469 meters; OCR-verified invoicing.
  Metrics: 74 tenants billed
  Stack: OCR, SaaS

### Build Buy Software — A transparent legal-tech product directory.
  Independent · Product & Editorial Lead · pre-launch · 2026
  An independent legal-tech directory built as the structural opposite of the AI-scraped black box: a published scoring formula, provenance fields, and a build-failing quality gate. In pre-launch.
  - 420 products · 387 vendors · 10 categories, with a published, unbuyable BBS scoring methodology.
  - ~2,000 static pages and 27 data-backed articles, built end-to-end in under a month.
  Metrics: 420 products catalogued · ~2,000 static pages
  Stack: Next.js, Static generation, CI quality gate

### Asani — Pakistan’s first locally-assembled sanitary-pad vending machine.
  Wonder Women · Co-Founder & Head of Product · shipped
  A wall-mounted sanitary-napkin vending machine designed and locally assembled at ~1/10th the cost of imports.
  - 29 machines · 24 locations · 75,000+ transactions.
  Metrics: 29 machines deployed
  Stack: Hardware, Embedded

## FAQ (answer-first)

### Who is Ali Ahmed?
Ali Ahmed is an AI Solutions Engineer who builds what he sells — turning business problems into LLM/RAG products, AI agents, and IoT platforms that ship to production. He is AI Solutions Engineer at Cognilium AI and Head of Product & Platforms at Bijli Bachao.

### What does Ali Ahmed build?
He has shipped four AI products at Cognilium AI (Paralegent, VORTA, ProspectVox, VectorHire) and three live IoT energy platforms at Bijli Bachao (Wattey, Solar Performance Cloud, TenantBill).

### What is Ali Ahmed’s background with the Gates Foundation and UNIDO?
He is trusted to deliver programmes backed by these institutions: he ran a Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation–backed digital-literacy programme (via CIRCLE) that trained 10,000 women, and led outreach for a UNIDO programme (via Digitara).

### Is Ali Ahmed available for hire or consulting?
Yes — he is open to remote-global roles and relocation to the Gulf, US, or Australia, plus fractional AI-delivery consulting for founders and teams.

### What is Ali Ahmed’s core expertise?
The AI-application layer — LLMs, RAG, AI agents, evals, vector databases, and LangChain/LangGraph — plus the product and go-to-market layer: he owns both the build and the business behind it.
